reasoning: The market asks whether Sydney Sweeney will publicly apologize for her involvement in the American Eagle ad by Dec 31, 2025. Today is Dec 21, 2025. Sweeney broke her silence regarding the summer ad controversy on December 5-6, 2025. In her statements, she explicitly defended her involvement in the ad, saying she loved the brand and the jeans. While she expressed regret for staying *silent* about the controversy and widening the divide, she did not apologize for her *involvement* in the ad itself. PR experts identified her approach as a "no-apology method." On December 11, the Polymarket probability was 0.03, showing that the betting market correctly interpreted her recent statements as not fulfilling the resolution criteria. With only 10 days remaining in the year and Sweeney having firmly established her final stance on the issue (in an exclusive to People and GQ interviews), there is essentially practically no chance she reverses this deeply entrenched PR strategy to suddenly offer a formal apology for the ad.
